title: Built AI Agentic Portfolio
description: Designed and shipped a portfolio driven by AI agents, integrating Jira MCP, OpenRouter, and Next.js App Router.
achievement: First portfolio powered by Claude as autonomous developer — tasks fetched from Jira and executed end-to-end by AI agents.

title: Led Platform Re-architecture
description: Drove the migration of a legacy monolith to a microservices architecture, reducing infra costs by 40%.
achievement: Reduced infrastructure costs by 40% and improved system uptime from 99.1% to 99.9% post-migration.

title: Senior Engineer Promotion
description: Promoted to Senior Full-Stack Engineer after shipping three high-impact products in under 18 months.
achievement: Shipped 3 high-impact products on time — each hitting production KPIs within the first 30 days of launch.

title: First Open Source Contribution
description: Merged a performance fix into a popular React state management library with 20k+ GitHub stars.
achievement: Fix reduced unnecessary re-render cycles by 30% across all consumer apps using the library globally.

title: Joined the Industry
description: Started as a Full-Stack Developer, building production web apps from day one at a fast-paced startup.
achievement: Deployed first production app within 3 months of joining — a real-time dashboard used by 500+ active users.
